methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series B → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.9x) to $23M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Housing & Construction (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 1 same-sector peers exist in Housing & Construction, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

private.name: Cover
private.rationale: Same sector (Housing & Construction), same stage (Series B)

data.narrative:
Cuby Technologies is a Series B stage company in Housing & Construction that has raised $23.4M to date. The comparable universe in this sector remains sparse, comprising 2 private peers (ICON and Cover) with no public comps available for direct benchmarking.

Given the limited peer set, a single valuation method was reliably applicable. Stage-progression analysis, using the $23.4M total raised as a proxy base value and applying a 1.9x multiplier typical of Series B to subsequent-stage step-ups, yields an implied valuation of $44M. This method assumes normalized capital deployment and growth trajectories consistent with sector norms at this funding stage.

The analysis supports a valuation range of $38M to $51M, centered on a $44M median. The range reflects reasonable uncertainty bounds around the single applicable method (±15% variance). Key uncertainties include the absence of directly comparable Housing & Construction peers at Series B stage, limiting the ability to validate stage-progression multiples against true sector benchmarks, and unknown metrics on customer concentration, unit economics, or growth rates that would inform revenue or earnings multiples. Any refinement of this range would require either expansion of the peer set across adjacent construction-tech or prefab segments, or disclosure of operational metrics enabling DCF or revenue-multiple calibration.
